versions.version_description: For intermediate players, set to original key, using chord progression based on what I hear in this video reference: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gq-4vIIJO30 -- fairly simple main loop, tried to shift chords for musical rather than textual readability.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: This version has improved chords based on the original song and has better formatting compared to the previous.

content:
' 4/4: Strum each chord 4 times

[tab]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
               It felt like springtime on this february morning[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
in the courtyard birds were singing your praise[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
 I'm still recalling things you said to make me feel[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
alright, i carry them with me today now[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
as I lay me down to sleep, yes I pray, that you will hold me dear[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
  though i'm far away, I whisper your name, into the sky[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
and i will wake up happy[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
i wonder why         i feel so high, while i'm not above my sorrow[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
heavy hearted 'til you call my name[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
and it sounds like churchbells or the whistle of a train[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
on a summer evening I want to meet you barefoot, barely breathing...[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
as i lay me down to sleep, yes i pray, that you will hold me dear[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
and i will wake up happy[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
as i lay me down to sleep, yes i pray, that you will hold me dear[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
  though i'm far away, i whisper your name, into the sky[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
and i will wake up happy[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
it's not too near for me, like a flower i need the rain[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Db[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Gb[/ch]              [ch]Ab[/ch]
though it's not real to me, every season has its change[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]        
and i will see you [/tab]

[tab]              [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
when the sun comes out again[/tab]
